positive: Minimalist abstract forest scene, deep emerald and sapphire color palette, featuring stylized, silhouetted woodland flora and fauna. Center composition with a gentle gradient background fading from midnight blue to deep teal. The main subject is a cluster of geometric, interlocking leaves and a graceful deer silhouette jumping over them. Art style should be clean, graphic, and highly contrasting, reminiscent of modern Japanese Ukiyo-e meets mid-century Scandinavian design. Crisp lines, high contrast, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, low quality, messy, watermark, text, logo, signature, fuzzy, poorly rendered, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy
